ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., malicious logon, suspicious activity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the incident occurred (e.g., Windows, Linux) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the incident detection (e.g., Azure Defender, Firewall) */,
  "detected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident was detected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., Open, In Progress, Closed) */,
  "response_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response team assigned to the incident */,
  "prediction_score" REAL /* Prediction score from machine learning model (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model used for prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_severity FOREIGN KEY ("severity") REFERENCES severities ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES incident_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_response_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_team_id") REFERENCES response_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type") REFERENCES incident_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_platform FOREIGN KEY ("platform") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the response team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response team */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_teams_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, responder, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., isolate system, run scan) */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affected_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affected entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the affected entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the affected entity (e.g., host, user, process) */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affected_entities_entity_type FOREIGN KEY ("entity_type") REFERENCES entity_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affected_entities_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor (e.g., attacker, user, process) */,
  "actor_type" TEXT /* Type of the actor (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_actors_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_actors_actor_type FOREIGN KEY ("actor_type") REFERENCES actor_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the actor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_impacts" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact */,
  "impact_name" TEXT /* Name of the impact */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_impact_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact mapping */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_impact_map_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_impact_map_impact_id FOREIGN KEY ("impact_id") REFERENCES incident_impacts ("impact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_threat_intelligence" (
  "intelligence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat intelligence entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "threat_source" TEXT /* Source of the threat intelligence (e.g., threat feed, manual input) */,
  "threat_indicator" TEXT /* Threat indicator (e.g., IP address, domain) */,
  "threat_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the threat indicator (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intelligence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_threat_intelligence_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_notes_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., incident summary, forensic analysis) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_entities" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-entity mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., login, access, modification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_entities_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES affected_entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_entities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity interaction */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source entity */,
  "target_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target entity */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., communication, access, modification) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_interactions_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES affected_entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_interactions_target_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_entity_id") REFERENCES affected_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly score */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "score" REAL /* Anomaly score (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the score calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_scores_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES affected_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., logistic regression, decision tree) */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Model parameters and hyperparameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for prediction */,
  "prediction_score" REAL /* Prediction score (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
